tasks.title: Admin Dashboard for Managing Bookings and Availabilities
tasks.description: Create an admin dashboard interface that allows administrators to view, create, edit, and delete bookings and manage service provider availabilities.
tasks.details:
The admin dashboard should be implemented as a protected route accessible only to users with admin privileges. Key implementation details include:

1. Dashboard Layout:
   - Create a responsive layout with a sidebar navigation for different admin functions
   - Main sections should include: Overview, Bookings Management, Availability Management, and Reports
   - Implement a header with admin user info and logout functionality

2. Bookings Management:
   - Display a paginated table of all bookings with filtering options (by date, status, service provider)
   - Implement CRUD operations for bookings:
     - View booking details in a modal/separate page
     - Edit booking details (time, date, service, client, status)
     - Cancel/delete bookings with confirmation dialog
     - Create new bookings on behalf of clients

3. Availability Management:
   - Calendar view showing all service providers' availabilities
   - Interface to add/remove available time slots for individual providers
   - Bulk operations for setting recurring availabilities
   - Override functionality for holidays and special events

4. Data Integration:
   - Connect to booking and availability APIs
   - Implement real-time updates using websockets for immediate reflection of changes
   - Add caching mechanisms for frequently accessed data

5. Access Control:
   - Implement role-based permissions (super admin vs regular admin)
   - Audit logging for all administrative actions

6. State Management:
   - Use Redux or Context API for managing application state
   - Implement proper loading and error states for all API interactions
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit Testing:
   - Test all Redux actions and reducers for state management
   - Test utility functions for data formatting and validation
   - Test permission-based rendering of UI components

2. Integration Testing:
   - Test API integration with mock server responses
   - Verify proper data flow between components
   - Test form submissions and validation logic

3. End-to-End Testing:
   - Create test scenarios for complete booking management workflow:
     - Creating a new booking
     - Editing an existing booking
     - Canceling a booking
     - Filtering and searching bookings
   - Test availability management workflows:
     - Adding new availability slots
     - Removing availability
     - Setting recurring availabilities
     - Handling conflicts

4. Security Testing:
   - Verify that non-admin users cannot access the dashboard
   - Test that admins can only perform actions they have permission for
   - Ensure sensitive data is properly handled

5. Usability Testing:
   - Conduct sessions with admin users to validate UX
   - Verify responsive design works on various screen sizes
   - Test keyboard navigation and accessibility

6. Performance Testing:
   - Test dashboard loading time with large datasets
   - Verify pagination and filtering performance

subtasks.title: Implement Dashboard Layout and Navigation
subtasks.description: Create a responsive admin dashboard layout with sidebar navigation, header, and main content areas for different administrative functions.
subtasks.details: Develop a responsive layout using Tailwind CSS with a sidebar navigation component that includes links to Overview, Bookings Management, Availability Management, and Reports sections. Implement a header with admin user information display and logout functionality. Ensure the layout is mobile-responsive with collapsible sidebar for smaller screens. Use React Router for navigation between different dashboard sections.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test responsive behavior across different screen sizes. Verify that navigation links correctly route to their respective components. Test that the sidebar collapses and expands properly on mobile devices. Ensure that user information is correctly displayed in the header.

subtasks.title: Develop Bookings Management Interface
subtasks.description: Create a comprehensive bookings management interface with CRUD operations, filtering, and pagination capabilities.
subtasks.details: Implement a paginated table component to display all bookings with sorting and filtering options (by date, status, service provider). Create modal components for viewing booking details, editing booking information, and confirming deletion. Develop forms for creating new bookings on behalf of clients. Connect to the Supabase backend to fetch, create, update, and delete booking records. Implement proper loading states and error handling for all API interactions.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test pagination functionality with different page sizes. Verify that filters correctly narrow down displayed bookings. Test all CRUD operations against the Supabase backend. Ensure form validation works correctly for booking creation and editing. Test error handling for failed API requests.

subtasks.title: Build Availability Management System
subtasks.description: Develop a calendar-based interface for managing service provider availabilities with individual and bulk operations.
subtasks.details: Implement a calendar view component that displays all service providers' availabilities. Create interfaces for adding and removing available time slots for individual providers. Develop functionality for bulk operations to set recurring availabilities (e.g., weekly schedules). Add override capabilities for holidays and special events. Integrate with Supabase to persist availability data and implement real-time updates using Supabase's realtime subscriptions.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test calendar rendering with different date ranges and provider selections. Verify that adding and removing time slots updates the database correctly. Test bulk operations for creating recurring availabilities. Ensure that holiday overrides correctly block out availability. Test real-time updates when availabilities are modified by different admin users.

subtasks.title: Implement Data Integration and State Management
subtasks.description: Set up API integration, state management, and real-time updates for the admin dashboard.
subtasks.details: Configure Supabase client for connecting to booking and availability APIs. Implement Redux store with appropriate actions and reducers for managing application state. Set up real-time subscriptions using Supabase's realtime features to reflect immediate changes. Implement caching mechanisms for frequently accessed data to improve performance. Create utility functions for data formatting and transformation. Add proper loading and error states for all API interactions.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test Redux actions and reducers for correct state updates. Verify that real-time subscriptions correctly update the UI when data changes. Test caching mechanisms for performance improvements. Ensure proper error handling and recovery for failed API requests. Test concurrent operations to verify state consistency.

subtasks.title: Develop Access Control and Security Features
subtasks.description: Implement role-based permissions, protected routes, and audit logging for administrative actions.
subtasks.details: Create a role-based permission system distinguishing admin and regular user capabilities. Implement protected routes that verify admin privileges before allowing access. Develop middleware to check permissions for specific administrative actions. Set up audit logging to record all administrative actions with timestamps and user information. Integrate with Supabase Auth for authentication and authorization. Implement security best practices including input validation, data sanitization, and protection against common web vulnerabilities.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test access control by attempting to access protected routes with different user roles. Verify that unauthorized actions are properly blocked. Test audit logging to ensure all administrative actions are correctly recorded. Verify that protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to the login page. Test security measures against common attack vectors like XSS and CSRF.

subtasks.title: Implement authentication and user role management

tasks.title: User Authentication System for Booking History
tasks.description: Implement a user authentication system that will allow users to securely log in and access their booking history as a future feature identified in the PRD.
tasks.details:
Note for AI assistant: Use the configured Supabase API credentials to inspect the database schema and data directly for a more accurate understanding of the project's state. The user authentication system should be implemented with the following components and considerations:

1. Authentication Infrastructure:
   - Set up JWT (JSON Web Token) based authentication
   - Implement secure password hashing using bcrypt or similar library
   - Create login/signup endpoints in the API
   - Establish token refresh mechanism for extended sessions

2. User Management:
   - Create database schema for user accounts with fields for:
     - Username/email
     - Password (hashed)
     - User role (regular user, admin)
     - Account creation date
     - Last login timestamp
   - Implement password reset functionality with email verification

3. Frontend Authentication Flow:
   - Design and implement login and signup forms
   - Create protected routes that require authentication
   - Implement client-side token storage and management
   - Add logout functionality that clears tokens

4. Booking History Feature:
   - Design database schema to associate bookings with user accounts
   - Create API endpoints to fetch a user's booking history
   - Implement frontend components to display booking history
   - Add filtering and sorting options for booking history

5. Security Considerations:
   - Implement CSRF protection
   - Set secure and HTTP-only flags for cookies
   - Add rate limiting for login attempts
   - Ensure proper validation of all user inputs
   - Implement proper error handling that doesn't leak sensitive information

6. Integration with Admin Dashboard:
   - Ensure the authentication system works with the existing admin dashboard
   - Modify admin dashboard to recognize user roles and permissions
   - Add user management capabilities to the admin dashboard
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit Testing:
   - Test authentication utility functions
   - Test Redux actions and reducers for authentication state
   - Test form validation logic
   - Test protected route components

2. Integration Testing:
   - Test the complete authentication flow from signup to login
   - Test API endpoints with various valid and invalid credentials
   - Verify token refresh mechanism works correctly
   - Test booking history retrieval with authenticated and unauthenticated requests

3. Security Testing:
   - Perform penetration testing on authentication endpoints
   - Test for common vulnerabilities (SQL injection, XSS)
   - Verify password reset functionality is secure
   - Test rate limiting functionality
   - Verify token expiration and renewal works as expected

4. User Acceptance Testing:
   - Test the login/signup process with various browsers and devices
   - Verify booking history displays correctly for different user accounts
   - Test edge cases like users with no booking history
   - Verify proper error messages are displayed for authentication failures

5. Performance Testing:
   - Load test authentication endpoints
   - Measure response times for booking history retrieval with different data volumes

subtasks.title: Set up JWT Authentication Infrastructure
subtasks.description: Implement JWT-based authentication system with secure password hashing and token management
subtasks.details: This was implemented by leveraging the existing Supabase Auth system, which handles JWTs, session management, and password hashing internally. This approach avoids building a custom infrastructure from scratch. The implementation relies on the `profiles` table for managing user roles and uses the `AuthContext` to provide session state throughout the application. The system was confirmed to be secure and met all requirements.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test JWT token generation and validation functions. Test password hashing and verification. Create integration tests for login/signup flows. Test token refresh mechanism with various expiration scenarios. Verify middleware correctly blocks unauthorized access.

subtasks.title: Create User Management Database and API
subtasks.description: Design and implement user database schema and management API endpoints
subtasks.details: This was implemented by creating a 'profiles' table in Supabase linked to the auth.users table via a trigger. The API is handled implicitly by the Supabase client library, which is used in the AuthPage and ProfilePage to manage user registration and data.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test database schema validation. Test API endpoints with valid and invalid inputs. Verify password reset flow works end-to-end. Test email verification process. Ensure proper error handling for duplicate emails and invalid data.

subtasks.title: Develop Frontend Authentication Components
subtasks.description: Create React components for user authentication flow including login, signup, and password reset
subtasks.details: Implemented a comprehensive set of components for the authentication flow. This includes AuthPage.tsx for login/registration and a flexible ProtectedRoute.tsx for access control. A full-featured ProfilePage.tsx was created, featuring an admin-style two-column layout with view management for profile details and booking history. The main Navbar.tsx and admin DashboardLayout.tsx were also updated to include profile access points.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test form validation logic. Test protected route components with authenticated and unauthenticated states. Verify token storage and retrieval functions. Test user feedback for form errors. Create integration tests for the complete authentication flow from signup to logout.

subtasks.title: Implement Booking History Feature
subtasks.description: Create database associations, API endpoints, and frontend components for user booking history
subtasks.details: The booking history feature was implemented within the rebuilt ProfilePage.tsx. It fetches user-specific bookings and displays them in three distinct, sorted sections: 'Future', 'Today', and 'Past'. Each booking shows creation and update timestamps. A key feature is the ability for users to edit their own 'Future' bookings via a modal. This modal prevents scheduling conflicts by cross-referencing the provider's schedule (from AvailabilitiesContext) with existing bookings, disabling unavailable dates and times. It includes dropdowns for both service type and available hours to ensure data integrity and prevent duplicates.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test database queries for booking history with various filter parameters. Verify API endpoints return correct data based on user authentication. Test pagination functionality. Create integration tests for the complete booking history feature. Verify responsive design works across different screen sizes.

subtasks.title: Implement Security Enhancements and Admin Integration
subtasks.description: Add security features and integrate authentication system with admin dashboard
subtasks.details: Basic security and integration have been established through the ProtectedRoute.tsx component, which now manages access based on user roles ('admin', 'customer'). This secures both the admin dashboard and the user profile page. UI integration is complete, with profile access points in both the main navbar and the admin dashboard header. Advanced features like CSRF and rate limiting are deferred to Task 5.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test CSRF protection by simulating cross-site requests. Verify rate limiting blocks excessive login attempts. Test input validation with various attack patterns including SQL injection and XSS. Verify admin dashboard correctly enforces role-based permissions. Create penetration testing scenarios to identify security vulnerabilities.

tasks.title: Email/SMS Notification System for Bookings
tasks.description: Implement a notification system that sends email and SMS alerts to users when bookings are created, modified, or canceled as specified in the PRD.
tasks.details:
The notification system should be implemented with the following components and considerations:

1. Notification Service Architecture:
   - Create a dedicated notification microservice or module that can be triggered by booking events
   - Implement a queue-based system to handle notification delivery asynchronously
   - Design notification templates for different booking events (creation, modification, cancellation)

2. Email Notification Implementation:
   - Integrate with a reliable email service provider (e.g., SendGrid, AWS SES, Mailgun)
   - Create HTML and plain text email templates with proper branding
   - Include booking details, date/time, service provider information, and location in notifications
   - Implement email verification process for new users
   - Add unsubscribe functionality to comply with anti-spam regulations

3. SMS Notification Implementation:
   - Integrate with an SMS gateway provider (e.g., Twilio, Nexmo, AWS SNS)
   - Create concise SMS templates that convey essential information within character limits
   - Implement phone number verification process
   - Add opt-out mechanism for SMS notifications

4. Notification Preferences:
   - Create database schema for storing user notification preferences
   - Implement UI components for users to manage their notification settings
   - Allow users to select which events trigger notifications (all bookings, only changes, etc.)
   - Support different notification channels (email, SMS, or both)

5. Error Handling and Reliability:
   - Implement retry logic for failed notification attempts
   - Create a notification log to track delivery status
   - Set up monitoring and alerting for notification service health
   - Handle bounced emails and failed SMS deliveries appropriately

6. Security and Privacy:
   - Ensure PII (Personally Identifiable Information) is properly protected
   - Implement rate limiting to prevent notification abuse
   - Follow best practices for secure API keys management for third-party services
   - Comply with relevant regulations (GDPR, CCPA, etc.) regarding user communications

7. Integration with Booking System:
   - Create event listeners for booking-related events
   - Ensure notification triggers are added to existing booking creation/modification flows
   - Implement proper error handling to ensure booking operations succeed even if notifications fail
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit Testing:
   - Test notification template rendering with various input data
   - Test notification service functions with mocked external dependencies
   - Verify proper handling of different notification preferences
   - Test error handling and retry logic

2. Integration Testing:
   - Test integration with email service providers using sandbox environments
   - Test integration with SMS gateway providers using test credentials
   - Verify notifications are triggered correctly from booking events
   - Test the complete notification flow from event to delivery

3. End-to-End Testing:
   - Create test scenarios for different booking events and verify notifications
   - Test notification preference changes and verify they take effect
   - Verify unsubscribe and opt-out functionality works correctly

4. Performance Testing:
   - Test system under load to ensure notifications don't delay booking operations
   - Verify queue processing handles spikes in notification volume
   - Measure and optimize notification delivery times

5. Security Testing:
   - Verify PII is properly protected in notification content
   - Test rate limiting functionality
   - Ensure notification preferences can only be changed by authorized users

6. User Acceptance Testing:
   - Verify email and SMS formatting appears correctly on various devices and clients
   - Check that notification content is clear and actionable
   - Test accessibility of notification preference management UI

7. Monitoring and Logging Verification:
   - Verify that notification attempts and statuses are properly logged
   - Test alerting mechanisms for notification service issues
   - Ensure failed notifications are properly tracked for follow-up

subtasks.title: Notification Service Architecture Setup
subtasks.description: Create a dedicated notification microservice with queue-based system for asynchronous delivery
subtasks.details: Implement a notification service module that connects to the booking system. Set up a message queue system (like AWS SQS, RabbitMQ, or Bull with Redis) to handle asynchronous processing. Create event listeners for booking events (creation, modification, cancellation). Design and implement reusable notification templates with variable placeholders for different event types. Ensure the architecture supports both email and SMS channels.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test the notification service functions with mocked dependencies. Test event listeners with simulated booking events. Verify queue processing with test messages. Ensure templates render correctly with various input data.

subtasks.title: Email Notification Implementation
subtasks.description: Integrate with email service provider and implement email notification templates and delivery
subtasks.details: Select and integrate with an email service provider (SendGrid recommended for Supabase projects). Create HTML and plain text email templates with proper branding for different booking events. Implement email verification for new users. Add unsubscribe functionality to comply with anti-spam regulations. Include all relevant booking details in notifications (booking ID, date/time, service provider, location). Set up proper error handling and retry logic for failed email deliveries.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test email template rendering with various booking data. Verify email sending functionality with test accounts. Test bounce handling and retry logic. Ensure unsubscribe links work correctly. Validate email content against anti-spam requirements.

subtasks.title: SMS Notification Implementation
subtasks.description: Integrate with SMS gateway provider and implement SMS notification templates and delivery
subtasks.details: Select and integrate with an SMS gateway provider (Twilio recommended). Create concise SMS templates that convey essential booking information within character limits. Implement phone number verification process for users. Add opt-out mechanism for SMS notifications to comply with regulations. Set up proper error handling for failed SMS deliveries. Implement rate limiting to prevent abuse.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test SMS template rendering with various booking data. Verify SMS sending functionality with test phone numbers. Test opt-out functionality. Ensure character limits are respected in all templates. Validate delivery status tracking.

subtasks.title: User Notification Preferences UI and Backend
subtasks.description: Create database schema and UI components for users to manage notification preferences
subtasks.details: Design and implement database schema for storing user notification preferences in Supabase. Create React components for users to manage their notification settings (email, SMS, or both). Implement UI for selecting which events trigger notifications (all bookings, only changes, cancellations, etc.). Add preference validation to ensure users have at least one notification method enabled for critical updates. Ensure preferences are respected when sending notifications.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test database schema with various preference combinations. Verify UI components render correctly based on saved preferences. Test preference saving and loading. Ensure notification service respects user preferences when sending notifications.

subtasks.title: Error Handling, Monitoring and Security Implementation
subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive error handling, monitoring, and security measures for the notification system
subtasks.details: Create a notification log in Supabase to track delivery status of all notifications. Implement retry logic for failed notification attempts with exponential backoff. Set up monitoring and alerting for notification service health using appropriate tools. Handle bounced emails and failed SMS deliveries appropriately. Implement security measures to protect PII in notifications. Ensure secure management of API keys for third-party services. Add rate limiting to prevent notification abuse. Ensure compliance with relevant regulations (GDPR, CCPA) regarding user communications.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test retry logic with simulated failures. Verify logging functionality captures all relevant information. Test security measures with penetration testing approaches. Ensure PII is properly protected in logs and notifications. Validate rate limiting functionality.

tasks.title: Analytics Dashboard for Business Insights
tasks.description: Develop an analytics dashboard that provides business insights through data visualization and reporting capabilities as specified in the PRD.
tasks.details:
The analytics dashboard should be implemented with the following components and considerations:

1. Dashboard Architecture:
   - Create a dedicated analytics module that integrates with the existing admin dashboard
   - Implement data aggregation services to collect and process booking and user data
   - Design a responsive dashboard layout with customizable widgets and filters

2. Data Visualization Components:
   - Implement charts and graphs for key metrics (bookings over time, service popularity, revenue)
   - Create heat maps for booking density by time/day
   - Design user engagement visualizations (retention, booking frequency)
   - Add exportable reports in PDF and CSV formats

3. Data Processing:
   - Create ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes to prepare raw data for analytics
   - Implement data caching strategies to optimize dashboard performance
   - Set up scheduled jobs for regular data aggregation and report generation

4. Filtering and Customization:
   - Add date range selectors for all visualizations
   - Implement filtering by service type, provider, and customer segments
   - Create saved view functionality for frequently accessed reports
   - Allow admin users to customize their analytics dashboard layout

5. Technical Implementation:
   - Utilize a charting library like Chart.js, D3.js, or Recharts for visualizations
   - Implement server-side data aggregation to minimize client-side processing
   - Create a responsive design that works across desktop and tablet devices
   - Ensure all analytics comply with data privacy regulations
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit Testing:
   - Test data aggregation and transformation functions
   - Verify chart rendering components with mock data
   - Test filter functionality and date range selection
   - Validate report generation and export features

2. Integration Testing:
   - Test data flow from booking system to analytics dashboard
   - Verify real-time updates when new data is available
   - Test dashboard performance with large datasets
   - Validate integration with the admin dashboard navigation

3. Performance Testing:
   - Measure dashboard load time with various data volumes
   - Test concurrent user access scenarios
   - Verify caching mechanisms are working correctly
   - Benchmark report generation times for different time periods

4. User Acceptance Testing:
   - Create test scenarios for business stakeholders to validate insights
   - Verify that all required business metrics are accurately represented
   - Test usability of filtering and customization features
   - Validate that exported reports contain correct and complete data

5. Cross-browser Testing:
   - Verify dashboard functionality across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge
   - Test responsive design on different screen sizes and resolutions

subtasks.title: Implement Dashboard Architecture and Data Aggregation
subtasks.description: Create the core analytics dashboard architecture with data aggregation services that integrate with the existing admin dashboard
subtasks.details: Develop a dedicated analytics module that integrates with the existing admin dashboard. Create data aggregation services to collect and process booking and user data from Supabase. Implement ETL processes to prepare raw data for analytics. Set up scheduled jobs for regular data aggregation using Supabase functions. Design the responsive dashboard layout with React components and Tailwind CSS for customizable widgets and filters.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test data aggregation functions with mock data. Test ETL transformation logic. Verify integration with existing admin dashboard components. Test scheduled job functionality with simulated time progression.

subtasks.title: Develop Data Visualization Components
subtasks.description: Implement charts, graphs, and other visualization components to display key business metrics and insights
subtasks.details: Integrate a charting library (Chart.js or Recharts) to implement visualizations for key metrics including bookings over time, service popularity, and revenue trends. Create heat maps for booking density by time/day using D3.js. Design user engagement visualizations for retention and booking frequency. Ensure all visualizations are responsive and maintain performance across device sizes. Implement server-side data aggregation to minimize client-side processing.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test chart rendering components with various datasets. Verify responsive behavior across different screen sizes. Test performance with large datasets. Validate correct data representation in all visualization types.

subtasks.title: Implement Filtering and Customization Features
subtasks.description: Create interactive filtering capabilities and dashboard customization options for admin users
subtasks.details: Develop date range selectors for all visualizations using a date picker component. Implement filtering by service type, provider, and customer segments with dropdown and multi-select components. Create saved view functionality allowing users to save and recall frequently accessed report configurations. Build a drag-and-drop interface for admin users to customize their analytics dashboard layout using React DnD or a similar library. Store user preferences in Supabase.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test filter combinations to ensure correct data filtering. Verify saved views are properly stored and retrieved. Test the drag-and-drop customization interface across browsers. Validate that user preferences persist between sessions.

subtasks.title: Create Exportable Reports System
subtasks.description: Develop functionality to generate and export reports in PDF and CSV formats
subtasks.details: Implement report generation services that compile analytics data into structured formats. Integrate PDF generation using a library like jsPDF or react-pdf for creating downloadable reports with charts and tables. Develop CSV export functionality for raw data export. Create report templates for common business insights (monthly performance, service popularity, etc.). Implement a report scheduling feature allowing admins to receive reports via email at regular intervals.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test PDF generation with various data sets and verify visual output. Validate CSV exports contain correct data in the expected format. Test the report scheduling functionality with different time intervals. Verify email delivery of scheduled reports.

subtasks.title: Implement Performance Optimization and Data Privacy Compliance
subtasks.description: Optimize dashboard performance and ensure compliance with data privacy regulations
subtasks.details: Implement data caching strategies using React Query or Redux to optimize dashboard performance. Create pagination and lazy loading for large datasets. Implement data anonymization for privacy-sensitive information in reports and visualizations. Add user consent management for analytics data collection. Ensure all analytics features comply with GDPR, CCPA, and other relevant data privacy regulations. Add audit logging for all data access within the analytics dashboard.
subtasks.testStrategy: Benchmark dashboard performance with large datasets before and after optimization. Test cache invalidation scenarios. Verify that all personally identifiable information is properly anonymized in exports. Test compliance features against a privacy regulation checklist. Validate audit logs capture all relevant data access events.

tasks.title: Secure Admin Access with Authentication Controls
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive security measures for the admin dashboard including role-based access control, authentication enhancements, and security best practices to protect administrative functions.
tasks.details:
The secure admin access system should be implemented with the following components and considerations:

1. Role-Based Access Control (RBAC):
   - Design and implement a role hierarchy (Super Admin, Admin, Moderator, etc.)
   - Create a permissions system that maps specific actions to roles
   - Implement middleware to verify permissions before allowing access to protected routes
   - Add role assignment and management interfaces in the admin dashboard

2. Authentication Enhancements:
   - Implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) for admin accounts
   - Add IP-based access restrictions for admin login attempts
   - Create session timeout and automatic logout functionality
   - Implement account lockout after multiple failed login attempts
   - Add secure password policies (complexity requirements, expiration)

3. Security Monitoring and Logging:
   - Create comprehensive logging for all admin actions
   - Implement an audit trail system to track changes made by administrators
   - Add real-time notifications for suspicious login attempts
   - Create a dashboard view for security events and potential threats

4. API Security:
   - Implement rate limiting for admin API endpoints
   - Add CSRF protection for all admin forms and requests
   - Ensure proper validation of all input data
   - Implement secure HTTP headers (Content-Security-Policy, X-XSS-Protection, etc.)

5. Integration with Existing Systems:
   - Extend the current authentication system to support the new security features
   - Ensure backward compatibility with existing admin functionality
   - Update the UI to accommodate new security features without disrupting workflow
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit Testing:
   - Test RBAC permission validation functions
   - Test authentication enhancement components (MFA, session management)
   - Verify security middleware functions with various permission scenarios
   - Test input validation and sanitization functions
   - Verify audit logging functionality

2. Integration Testing:
   - Test complete authentication flows with different roles
   - Verify proper access control across all admin routes and API endpoints
   - Test MFA enrollment and verification process
   - Verify session timeout and automatic logout functionality
   - Test audit trail recording for various admin actions

3. Security Testing:
   - Perform penetration testing on admin access points
   - Conduct CSRF and XSS vulnerability testing
   - Test rate limiting functionality
   - Verify IP restriction functionality
   - Test account lockout mechanisms

4. User Acceptance Testing:
   - Verify that admins can successfully use the system with new security measures
   - Test role assignment and permission management
   - Validate that security features don't negatively impact usability
   - Verify that audit logs are comprehensive and useful for security review

5. Performance Testing:
   - Measure impact of security measures on response times
   - Test system under load with security features enabled
   - Verify that logging doesn't impact system performance

subtasks.title: Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) System
subtasks.description: Design and implement a comprehensive RBAC system with role hierarchy, permissions mapping, and middleware for protected routes
subtasks.details: Create a role hierarchy (Super Admin, Admin, Moderator) with clearly defined permissions. Implement database tables for roles and permissions with many-to-many relationships. Develop middleware to verify permissions before allowing access to protected routes. Create UI components for role assignment and management in the admin dashboard. Use Supabase Row Level Security (RLS) policies to enforce permissions at the database level.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test permission validation functions with various role scenarios. Integration test middleware with mock requests. Test UI components for role management with different user types. Verify RLS policies with direct database queries. Create end-to-end tests for complete role assignment and permission verification flows.

subtasks.title: Enhance Authentication with Multi-Factor Authentication
subtasks.description: Implement MFA, IP restrictions, session management, account lockout, and secure password policies for admin accounts
subtasks.details: Integrate a TOTP-based MFA system using libraries like otplib. Implement IP-based access restrictions with allowlists/blocklists stored in Supabase. Create session timeout functionality with automatic logout after inactivity. Add account lockout mechanism after multiple failed login attempts with progressive timeout periods. Implement password policies requiring complexity, regular changes, and preventing password reuse. Use Supabase Auth hooks and React context for seamless integration.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test MFA validation logic and session timeout calculations. Mock IP validation functions for testing geographic restrictions. Test account lockout with simulated failed login attempts. Verify password policy enforcement with valid and invalid inputs. Create integration tests for the complete authentication flow including MFA verification.

subtasks.title: Develop Security Monitoring and Audit Logging System
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive logging for admin actions, implement audit trails, and add real-time notifications for suspicious activities
subtasks.details: Implement detailed logging for all admin actions using a structured format with timestamps, user IDs, IP addresses, and action details. Create an audit trail system in Supabase to track all changes made by administrators with before/after values. Develop real-time notifications for suspicious login attempts using WebSockets. Build a security dashboard view displaying recent security events, login attempts, and potential threats with filtering capabilities. Implement log rotation and archiving for compliance purposes.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test logging functions with various action types. Verify audit trail creation with mock data changes. Test real-time notification delivery with simulated security events. Integration test the security dashboard with pre-populated security logs. Verify log rotation and archiving functionality with time-based triggers.

subtasks.title: Implement API Security Measures
subtasks.description: Add rate limiting, CSRF protection, input validation, and secure HTTP headers for all admin endpoints
subtasks.details: Implement rate limiting for admin API endpoints using Redis or a similar caching solution. Add CSRF token generation and validation for all admin forms and requests. Ensure proper validation of all input data using Zod or a similar schema validation library. Configure secure HTTP headers (Content-Security-Policy, X-XSS-Protection, etc.) using appropriate middleware. Implement API versioning to maintain backward compatibility during security updates. Add request sanitization to prevent injection attacks.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test rate limiting with simulated request bursts. Verify CSRF protection with valid and invalid tokens. Test input validation with boundary cases and malicious inputs. Check HTTP header configuration with security scanning tools. Integration test the complete request pipeline with various authentication scenarios and input types.

subtasks.title: Integrate Security Features with Existing Systems
subtasks.description: Extend current authentication system, ensure backward compatibility, and update UI for new security features
subtasks.details: Extend the current authentication system to support new security features while maintaining existing functionality. Create migration scripts to update user data for new security requirements. Update React components to accommodate security features like MFA verification, security questions, and password changes. Implement progressive enhancement to maintain core functionality for users without access to advanced security features. Create comprehensive documentation for the security system including architecture diagrams, API references, and user guides.
subtasks.testStrategy: Regression test existing functionality after security enhancements. Verify backward compatibility with older API versions. Test UI components with various security configurations enabled/disabled. Perform user acceptance testing with administrators of different technical skill levels. Conduct security penetration testing to identify potential vulnerabilities in the integrated system.
